blocks.content: He found her at her locker before homeroom, which was a C-wing detour that would make him late if he didn't move fast.
She looked at him over her locker door.
She closed her locker and looked at him.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I didn't mean anything by the water tower thing.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I know I don't have to. I'm doing it anyway.
She shifted her backpack. Down the hall the two-minute warning bell rang.
He didn't say anything for a second.
She said it in a way that might have been true. He stood there one second longer than he should have and then turned and went back to B-wing.
